reason: Most hospital-based Anesthesia Technician roles require mandatory on-call duties, meaning technicians must carry a pager on nights and weekends and be ready to respond to emergencies within 30 minutes. Additionally, shift assignments are often based on seniority, leaving newer technicians with unpredictable, variable rotations into evenings and nights. These structural demands noticeably compromise personal time and represent a major disruption to work-life balance.
